name: Static Color
description: Stały, jednolity kolor lub statyczny gradient na wszystkich klawiszach.
code:
brightness = params.get('brightness', 1.0)
color = params.get('color', [255, 255, 255])
grad_on = params.get('gradientOn', False)
grad_colors = [c for c in params.get('gradientColors', []) if sum(c)>0]
width = 1.0 / 15.0
for key_name, virtual_id in key_map.items():
    base = virtual_id * 3
    if base + 2 >= 384: continue
    if grad_on and grad_colors:
        kn = key_name.lower()
        x_pos = LAYOUT_X.get(kn, 0)
        phase = min(1.0, max(0.0, x_pos * width))
        n = len(grad_colors)
        if n == 1:
            c = grad_colors[0]
            r, g, b = c[0]*brightness, c[1]*brightness, c[2]*brightness
        else:
            p = phase * (n - 1)
            idx1 = int(p)
            idx2 = min(idx1 + 1, n - 1)
            frac = p - idx1
            c1, c2 = grad_colors[idx1], grad_colors[idx2]
            r = (c1[0]*(1-frac) + c2[0]*frac) * brightness
            g = (c1[1]*(1-frac) + c2[1]*frac) * brightness
            b = (c1[2]*(1-frac) + c2[2]*frac) * brightness
    else:
        r, g, b = color[0]*brightness, color[1]*brightness, color[2]*brightness
    matrix[base] = int(r)
    matrix[base+1] = int(g)
    matrix[base+2] = int(b)
